meaning: n.编法,织法,编织vt.编织,组合,编排,使迂回前进vi.纺织,迂回行进,摇晃n.织法,织物
examples: She sat at her loom and continued to weave.
They would spin and weave cloth, cook and attend to the domestic side of life.
The key is to weave relevant personal anecdotes into your writing.
Even before we have laid down our bags, however, the little island has begun to weave its spell.
They weave the most desired silks for brides and formal dresses for Indian women.
